{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Fisher madra
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher madra]] is not suitable for the current task.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fisher Gesha]] shot a web of purple [[Fisher madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
